title: 5 things a godly man builds before 25
caption:
Your 20s don't come back.

Most guys spend them reacting — to their phone, to their friends, to whatever the feed puts in front of them. They end up at 30 wondering why they feel hollow.

A man walking with God doesn't let that happen. He builds.

A clean conscience. A body he stewards. The Word, before the scroll. Two men who know him. A skill worth paying for.

None of this is complicated. None of it is easy.

If you're in your 20s, you're early. Not early to start thinking about it — early to actually do it. The difference between the man you are and the man you could be is decided in these years.

"Whatever a man sows, that he will also reap." — Galatians 6:7

Stop reacting. Start building.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the ETHOS link.
